title: erodium rupestre
intro: Erodium rupestre, also known as mountain filaree, is a perennial herb belonging to the geranium family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erodium rupestre include its ability to soothe gastrointestinal problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Erodium rupestre include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
